title: Medium Plugin Frontmatter
description: Validates visual medium plugin frontmatter for vault/archive/visual-aesthetics/mediums/{medium}.md.

type.description: Artifact discriminator for medium plugin records.

medium.description: Stable medium identifier implemented by this plugin.

version.description: Plugin schema and methodology version in semver form.

description.description: Human-readable summary of the medium plugin's scope.

applicable_aesthetic_axes.description: Allowed universal visual-axis values for this medium.

density.description: Allowed density values for the medium.

topology.description: Allowed layout or composition topology values for the medium.

expressiveness.description: Allowed visual expressiveness values for the medium.

motion.description: Allowed motion posture values for the medium.

platform.description: Allowed platform idiom values for the medium.

trust.description: Allowed trust, risk, and institutional posture values for the medium.

medium_extension_axes.description: Medium-specific axes beyond the six universal axes.

^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$.description: Definition of a medium-specific axis and its allowed values.

description.description: Human-readable meaning of the extension axis.

values.description: Allowed values for this extension axis.

required.description: Whether the extension axis must be set when this medium is used.

mockup_format.description: Primary mockup source and capture format for the medium.

mockup_anchor_count_min.description: Minimum number of anchor mockups required before locking a visual specification.

mockup_revisions_per_anchor_min.description: Minimum captured revisions required for each anchor mockup.

token_families.description: Token families extracted and enforced for this medium.

token_extractor_script.description: Repository-relative script path used to extract tokens for this medium.

parity_methodology.description: Methodology used to compare locked mockups to regenerated or runtime artifacts.

renderer_script.description: Repository-relative renderer script used for parity checks.

comparison_metrics.description: Metrics that must be computed for parity evaluation.

thresholds.description: Named numeric thresholds applied by the parity checker.

additionalProperties.description: Threshold value for a named parity metric.

required_artifacts.description: Source artifacts that must exist for parity evaluation.

runtime_check_methodology.description: Methodology used to verify delivered runtime artifacts against the locked VS.

capture_method.description: How runtime evidence is captured for this medium.

checks.description: Runtime checks this medium plugin enables.

budgets.description: Optional runtime budget limits for checks, in seconds.

additionalProperties.description: Maximum runtime seconds for a named check.

gospel_template_path.description: Repository-relative build-agent gospel template for this medium.

applicable_presets.description: Preset identifiers that can be used with this medium.

regression_replay_contract.description: Declares whether preset/token mutations can be replayed deterministically for regression checks.

supported.description: Whether deterministic replay is supported for this medium.

renderer_script.description: Repository-relative renderer used for regression replay.

required_source_artifacts.description: Artifact kinds required to replay historical visual specifications.

supported_token_mutations.description: Token mutation globs that can be replayed deterministically.

unsupported_token_mutations.description: Token mutation globs that cannot be replayed deterministically.

unsupported_mutation_behavior.description: How the proposer behaves when replay is unsupported.

replay_fixture.description: Repository-relative fixture path used to verify replay support.

replay_determinism_test.description: Repository-relative test command or script that proves replay determinism.
